core_mechanism: reference-dependent valuation: a value function scoring the signed deviation of an agent's state from a reference level derived from the population, with asymmetric (kinked) sensitivity to positive versus negative deviations around that reference point
brief_reason: The best-fitting model evaluates outcomes by contrasting envy and pride (upward vs downward comparisons to peers) through a Prospect-Theory value function, which is exactly an asymmetric reference-dependent scoring of deviations from a comparison reference.
